base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of puyo_pieces — a pickup_item from 1991 puyo puyo. 4 puyo colors (red/blue/green/yellow) × face expressions (idle/nervous/scared/pop) + garbage puyo (gray clear-resistant) + pair-orientations. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4 puyo colors (red/blue/green/yellow) × face expressions (idle/nervous/scared/pop) + garbage puyo (gray clear-resistant) + pair-orientations
